title: Compbuild Textures
description: Compbuild Textures is a realistic resource pack made for creative mode. Originally designed for Minecraft Architecture, you can use the pack for so much more.
body:
![Pack](https://i.imgur.com/9tjDKRc.jpeg) Compbuild Textures is a realistic resource pack designed for building and creative use. With thousands of unique models available through biome dependency, custom item models, and blockstates, the possibilities are endless. With Compbuild Textures, you can effortlessly craft realistic environments within Minecraft, completely free of charge. Our commitment to staying up-to-date with the latest Minecraft features ensures that our pack will be compatible with the latest version of Minecraft most of the time. # Explore Compbuild
Pack Catalog & Online Reference Sheet
Want a dark theme, better performance 2D leaves, PBR? Head to our [GitHub](https://github.com/Compbuild) to view all of our other Compbuild Textures related things!
# Compbuild Server - Visit Compbuild's official server! ![server](https://i.imgur.com/jENrsOx.png) We have a lot of builds built with Compbuild Textures on our server and our reference world. We also have a lot of tools available to use that help enhance Compbuild to the fullest!
